parsed.production_notes: The video uses a screencast of an app interface combined with a likely stock or green-screened human hand overlay. The background illustrations within the app appear to be AI-generated, given their distinct stylized and painted aesthetics.

characters.appearance: A fair-skinned human hand and forearm. The hand has short, neatly trimmed, unpainted fingernails.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing is visible on the forearm.
characters.demeanor: Deliberate and precise, tapping specific areas of the screen.

scenes.setting: Digital app interface featuring a stylized farm illustration.

panels.panel_visual_description: A fair-skinned human hand, Character A, points its index finger towards the center of the frame. Behind the hand is a flat, stylized illustration of various farm animals. The animals, which include a pig, horses, sheep, and chickens, are arranged in a horizontal line in front of a dark, geometric barn structure. The illustration utilizes a muted color palette consisting primarily of blacks, whites, browns, and dark reds.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a screencast of a mobile app. A human hand overlays the screen, tapping on specific words within a block of English text. Above the text is a stylized illustration of farm animals. When a word is tapped, a small pop-up dictionary definition appears.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others.
Unknown speaker says: equal
Unknown speaker says: important
scenes.on_screen_text:
อ่านหนังสือภาษาอังกฤษวันละ 10 นาที (Read English books 10 minutes a day)
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.
equal [ˈiːkwəl] เท่าเทียม (equal) รับแล้ว (Received) เรียน (Learn)
important [ɪmˈpɔːrtnt] สำคัญ (important) รับแล้ว (Received) เรียน (Learn)

scenes.setting: Digital app interface featuring a painted farm illustration.

panels.panel_visual_description: A fair-skinned human hand, Character A, points its index finger towards the center of the frame. The background is a painted-style illustration of farm animals in a pastoral setting. A brown cow, several sheep, and a light-colored horse are visible in the foreground, with a red barn situated in the distance. The lighting in the illustration is warm and golden, suggesting a late afternoon or early evening setting.

scenes.visual_description: The scene continues as a screencast of a mobile app with a human hand overlay. The background illustration has changed to a more realistic, painted style depicting farm animals. The hand continues to tap on various words in the English text block below the image, triggering pop-up dictionary definitions for each tapped word.

scenes.on_screen_text:
อ่านหนังสือภาษาอังกฤษวันละ 10 นาที (Read English books 10 minutes a day)
แอนิมัลฟาร์ม จอร์จ ออร์เวลล์ (Animal Farm George Orwell)
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.
